scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start:dev -w heylo-api" "npm run dev -w heylo-web"
scripts.dev:tablet: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- bash -c 'cd tablet && npm run dev'
scripts.db:pull: dotenv -e .env.dev -e .env -- bash -c 'docker compose exec -T mysql mysqldump -h $DB_HOST -u $DB_USER -p"$DB_PASS" --single-transaction --set-gtid-purged=OFF $DB_NAME | mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -u root $DB_NAME'
scripts.db:migrate: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=tsconfig-paths/register dotenv -e .env.local -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx typeorm-ts-node-commonjs migration:run -d data-source.ts'
scripts.db:migrate:show: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=tsconfig-paths/register dotenv -e .env.local -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx typeorm-ts-node-commonjs migration:show -d data-source.ts'
scripts.db:revert: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=tsconfig-paths/register dotenv -e .env.local -e .env -- bash -c 'cd backend && npx typeorm-ts-node-commonjs migration:revert -d data-source.ts'
